titleStmt.title: SII 18.187: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 187. (B.K. No. 120 of 1933-34.) BĀBĀNAGAR, BIJAPUR TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying in the ruined temple of Śiva.

summary.p: This worn out inscription seems to be a composite record of two grants for a Jinālaya built at Kannaḍige. The first grant made by Bijjaḷa is dated in Śaka 1083, Vikrama, Pu[shya]. The Śaka year cited is the current year. The details preserved correspond to A.D. 1160, November-December. A certain Jaina priest (name lost) of Mangaḷavēḍa, belonging to Mūla-saṁgha and Dēs11i-gaṇa is mentioned. The date of the second grant which was made by Sōmēs11vara (i.e., Sōvidēva) is lost except Pushya ba. 13, Sunday, Uttarāyaṇa-[saṁkramaṇa]. Mōdeganūru is mentioned as the capital. The (coin called) Lokkiya-vīsa is also mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrīmatuparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalānchanaṁ jīyāttraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ . svasti
śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ . kāḷāṁjanapuravarādhīśvaraṁ suva
rṇnavṛśabhadhvajaṁ . rūpamakaradhvajaṁ . satyarādhēyaṁ . śaucagāṁgēyaṁ . parāṁganā putra vaṁdijanami
traṁ kaligaḷankuśaṁ . samaramukhaniraṁkuśaṁ . kaḷacuryyakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍaṁ . kadana pracaṁḍaṁ . śrī
matu sermmāḍidēvapriyāgranandanaṁ . vividhavibhavasaṁkraṁdananumenisi © kaḷacurikṣmāpā
ḷavaṁśaṁ ṇadēva cāri
śaiḷaṁgaḷoḷghanaśai du tanna
ya tōḷa vacōviḷāsa paṁkēruha se tanna
sirivōdudu tannadese māḷa
vana meysiri cōḷana tōḷa pāḷana pāṁcāḷana paṁca
rathavinituṁ desegeṭṭu Ā nṛpa
ratnana tammaṁ śrīniḷaya śrīniḷayaṁ vīramaiḷugikṣō
ṇīśaṁ . munipa tte
ṟuvudyōgamanadoḷe caṁ
dramaṁ . ka . Enisida
vīramaiḷugikṣōṇīśaṁ .
salu sālva
gaḷaṁ . parivāraṁ pratipaṁ rmmū
ligarpparamārādhya bhūcakra
doḷ . jinapādāṁbujabhṛṁga māṇi
kyabhaṭṭārakaṁ munirājaṁ sukha navinne saṁ
varṇnipeṁ . surataruvi payōdhige vēḷe
yideṁbaṁte satya nane māḍidaṁ
saukhyahētuvāge nūrmmaḍi dhārmmika
raṁ ravidēvacandraprabha māḍisi piridoṁdunnatiya
nappukeydu kannaḍigeya jina jvaḷapūrṇnacaṁ
dra sajja catu
rvvidhadānadiṁdrabhūja lōkatrayamānadaṁ
ḍavidu staṁbhavideṁdu ḍisidaṁ parārtthahitaṁ cāvuṁḍa
rāyaṁ guṇāspadanatyuṁnata bhujasahāyanuṁ ni
jabhujapratāpa muttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamā
navācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu rājyaṁgeyutta virddu ji
nagandhōdakapavitrīkṛtō mēgha
nuṁ parijanapārijātanumappa bijjaṇadēvarasaru sakava
rṣa 1083 neya vikramasaṁvatsarada pu parvvanimittaṁ
maṁgaḷavēḍada rāyarācāryya mūlasaṁghada dēśi gaṇada tri
bhuvanadēvara santāna māṇikya kannaḍiye nalmāḍisida
kannaḍigeya paṭṭana kuḷakaraṇi ṣṭavidhārccane gaṁ riṣiyarā
hāradānakkaṁ khaṁḍaschuṭitajīrṇnōddhāra ḍarasana saṁkarasana mūli
gavānyadiṁ teṁkalu kādēviya rājēsvara
dēvara mūnyadiṁ paḍuvalu biṭṭa matta 24 kkaṁ mata 1 kkelo
kkiyavīsa 10ra lekkadiṁdaruvaṇa yiṁ tenkalu
beṭṭadiṁ mūḍalu haḷḷadiṁ paḍuvalu rppariṁ teṁkalu .
nimirddu yilliṁ maneyiṁ brahmēśvara dēvara
mānyada maneya yiṁ paḍu
valu biṭṭa mānyakāṟaru maṁ
gaḷuṁ samastapraje bhūtaḷamanēka
chatradiṁdāḻuttu tāḻdida paṭṭa bandhana
maṁ taṁna bhujabala ḷuva
dhramaṁ suvaṁte se
yaṁ sōmanṛpaṁ
bāhattara rājadhā
niyoḷ śaradhi gaṁ
bhīranarttinidhi doḷage mōdeganū
ra nelevīḍinoḷa nāyakara binnapadiṁ
caṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
mappasama
rasaruṁ samasta praje
gaḷ . svasti śrīmatu kaḷacuryya vatsarada puṣyabahuḷa
13 Ādivāradandu Uttarāyaṇa candamayyaṁ māḍisida
kannaḍigeya basadi khaṁḍasphuṭita jīrṇnōddhā
rakkaṁ nabāva
matta 1 lo
kkiyavīsa
completely worn out
posamuttaṁ caturāsyanāydamṛtadiṁdaṁ tōydu kōdikkidekkasaraṁ vāgvadhu vige tānenisi suvyaktaṁgaḷādakkaraṁ misugalu śāsanamaṁ samantu baredaṁThe last two lines are engraved at the top.
śrīmallināthadēvāvasathaṁ satkavi nāgacaṁdranutamommaṁ nāgacandrāgrajaṁ . mūliga nāgāryyaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 18.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
